overview: poppler could be made to crash if it opened a specially crafted file.
description:
It was discovered that poppler incorrectly handled certain PDF files.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a crash.

 

 

 

It was discovered that poppler incorrectly handled certain PDF files.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a crash.
full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7858-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7858-1: poppler vulnerability

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
5 November 2025

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
poppler could be made to crash if it opened a specially crafted file.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.10

 25.04

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

20.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 poppler - PDF rendering library
 

 

 
Details

 

 

It was discovered that poppler incorrectly handled certain PDF files.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a crash.

 

 

 

It was discovered that poppler incorrectly handled certain PDF files.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a crash.

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.10

questing

25.03.0-10ubuntu0.1
